title: RML Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: RML Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Consultant Physician to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
